positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a crescent moon and surrounding constellations formed by abstract, flowing geometric lines. The central composition features a large, luminous, creamy white moon surrounded by deep indigo and sapphire-blue glyphs and constellations, resembling celestial navigation maps. The style should be modern geometric abstract, reminiscent of Art Deco celestial charts but simplified for clean printing. High contrast, with the luminous white elements sharply outlined against the dark, deep background. Emphasize clean lines, perfect symmetry, and negative space. Use flat design principles with subtle gradients only within the celestial bodies. Suitable for a repeat pattern or single centered graphic, designed for apparel print.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, grainy, complex background, photographic, realistic photo, messy lines
